title: Hellblade: Senua's Sacrifice
notes: Graphics work out of the box (and actually adding the option "PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%" as other suggested breaks them for me). Gamepad detected without problems. However it has audio issues (chirping and quiet voices). Workaround: Edit the wine prefix for the game and add an override for xaudio2_7 (native).

title: Holdfast: Nations At War
notes: textures of bodies missed just saw heads with weapons lmao and menu not really accessible in game btw

title: Holdfast: Nations At War
notes: ok the parameter "PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%" do the trick and solve problems of missed body's texture

title: Holdfast: Nations At War
notes: randomly lose mouse/keyboard control when you defocus (xfce desktop)
Requires Proton 3.16-3 beta and latest MESA git /w the ext_transform thing, then runs perfectly.
title: Holdfast: Nations At War

notes: Works great until the mouse seems to randomly lose control and forces you to look straight up or down and just spin in place. Seems to happen every 15-20 minutes of gameplay.
title: Holdfast: Nations At War

notes: You can see bodies after putting in "PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%" but mostly after every game you lose control of your mouse and are unable to choose a team.Also, if you try to exit and re-enter (using the Windows key) you will be able to choose a team but your sensitivity will be through the roof, and all you can do is spin.
title: Holdfast: Nations At War

notes: works well now no longer need the wined3d11 trick, don't launch in fullscreen mode though or you will lose the focus
